subject: Science
instructions: Write the answers to the cloze passage in the crossword puzzle below.
question_text: An adult mosquito lays its eggs in (i)________ water. As it (ii)________, it sheds its skin several times and eats a lot. When it changes into a pupa, it also breathes through an air (iii)________ that pierces through the water surface. During this stage, it does not feed and it hardly (iv)________.
model_answer: i) still, ii) grow, iii) tube, iv) moves

subject: Science
question_text: The life cycle of a mealworm beetle is most similar to the life cycle of a butterfly. Based on the diagram above, give two reasons why.

subject: Science
question_text: At which stages, A, B and/or C, is the plant able to make food? Explain why.
correct_answer: C and B. Because stages C and B have leaves.
model_answer: C and B. Because stages C and B have leaves.

subject: Science
question_text: May wanted to find out if seeds need light to germinate. She placed some seeds into two identical pots, A and B, and watered them daily. She placed pot A near an open window and pot B inside a dark cupboard. She observed the growth of the seeds over four days. State all the conditions necessary for the seeds to germinate.
passage: May wanted to find out if seeds need light to germinate. She placed some seeds into two identical pots, A and B, and watered them daily. She placed pot A near an open window and pot B inside a dark cupboard. She observed the growth of the seeds over four days.

subject: Science
question_text: May's brother said that the seeds in Pot B will not germinate as they did not receive sunlight. Do you agree? Explain why.
correct_answer: No. Because the seeds don't have leaves yet and only leaves need the sunlight.
